title: TrustForge Session Migration
description: Signed record describing a TrustForge session being moved between transports while preserving session_id, generation, and trust continuity (TF-0003 "session migration").

migration_version.description: Version of the session-migration schema itself.

session_id.description: The session id that survives the migration. Must equal the pre-migration session id.

generation.description: Migration counter. Increases by 1 per migration; lets receivers detect replays.

rotated_keys.description: Whether the session keys were rotated as part of the migration.

reason.description: Human-readable reason (transport upgrade, network change, peer reconnect, ...).
